title: Starmover
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Starmover''''' was a pair of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] used by the [[Habassa]]. The freighters placed containers containing foodstuffs near [[Retep III]]. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] freighters called ''[[Kielty]]'' were to pick these supplies afterwards. They managed to do so despite being attacked by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Anjisan]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
